issues_encountered: subagent 返回了 nested JSON 结构（card.tldr/key_takeaways/concepts/details/patterns/gotchas/links）而非 card_body_markdown 字符串——主 Claude 收尾时整理为标准 markdown body 并精简至 5 条核心 takeaway
原文信息密度极高：12+8+5 = 25 个 takeaway-class 信息，Card 阶段精选 5 条最关键的（commands=skills 等价 / 4 级加载 / 16 frontmatter / 动态 context / bundled skills），其余推至 Brief

cross_check_anchors.verbatim: A file at .claude/commands/deploy.md and a skill at .claude/skills/deploy/SKILL.md both create /deploy and work the same way.
